normalized_intent: Recover Persona and Relay as mandatory ingress/egress boundaries for the single-carrier sequential runtime.

ambiguity_notes: Raw user language remains user intent until Relay boundary translation and Steward routing.
Visible persona names and style signals are persona-surface data, not system truth by themselves.
donor_line_notes: Aletheion translation discipline governs meaning-before-wording and true-name preservation.
Relay is a semantic-boundary/courier role, not final persona owner or orchestrator.
semantic_packet.intake: Recover Persona and Relay as mandatory ingress/egress boundaries for the single-carrier sequential runtime.
loss_notes: This runtime adapter emits a first-pass semantic packet; deeper true-name resolution may refine it.
recommended_followups: Steward should route only from the Relay semantic-boundary packet, not from raw user text alone.
